target_note: User initially described M4 Max 64 GB; live inspection of 192.168.0.130 showed M5 Max 64 GB and user explicitly approved proceeding on that host.

measurement.warmup: one identical request before each ordinary workload
measurement.cold_prefill: unique nonce before long body to prevent long-prefix reuse
measurement.concurrency: three waves of four simultaneous short requests
measurement.power: not measured; powermetrics required an interactive sudo password
measurement.memory: process-tree RSS sampling; mmap/unified-memory accounting makes this a lower-bound observation, not total model residency
